headline: Wall Street Just Supersized Its Price Targets on Okta and Fortinet. Are Cybersecurity Stocks a Must-Own in 2026?
summary: Wells Fargo just slashed its price targets on two major cybersecurity stocks while keeping cautious ratings intact, and that contradiction tells investors something important about where this red-hot sector actually stands heading into 2026.

raw.headline: Wall Street Just Supersized Its Price Targets on Okta and Fortinet. Are Cybersecurity Stocks a Must-Own in 2026?

headline: CrowdStrike (CRWD) Expands STACKIT Partnership And Names AJ Shipley Product Chief
summary: CrowdStrike Holdings (NasdaqGS:CRWD) expanded its partnership with Schwarz Digits GmbH to offer the Falcon platform on STACKIT, a sovereign EU cloud. The move is intended to give European enterprises cloud security options that align with regional regulations and data sovereignty requirements. CrowdStrike also appointed AJ Shipley as Chief Product Officer, drawing on his experience in senior roles at major cybersecurity companies. CrowdStrike Holdings, trading around $203.08 per share, is...

headline: 2 High-Flying Stocks with Exciting Potential and 1 We Brush Off
summary: “You get what you pay for” often applies to expensive stocks with best-in-class business models and execution. While their quality can sometimes justify the premium, they typically experience elevated volatility during market downturns when expectations change.

headline: Can XM Cyber IP Acquisition Strengthen CrowdStrike's Falcon Platform?
summary: CRWD is strengthening the Falcon platform with XM Cyber's attack path technology to expand exposure management and support an AI-driven platform strategy.
